candidate_findings.evidence: Top header text appears at the top margin and matches the extracted NIST SP 800-53 header string.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is page chrome/header content with appropriate bounding box and text.

candidate_findings.evidence: The horizontal rule beneath the top header is captured as an underscore/header line at the correct top-page location.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate represents header chrome rather than body content, and its bbox aligns with the rendered line.

candidate_findings.evidence: The footer shows CHAPTER THREE on the left and PAGE 18 on the right, spanning the bottom margin.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted normalized footer text and wide bottom bbox agree with page chrome behavior.

candidate_findings.evidence: The rotated left-margin boilerplate DOI/free-charge notice is boxed separately from the main body.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is side chrome/boilerplate and the bounding box matches the vertical margin text.

candidate_findings.evidence: The rendered heading reads 3.1 ACCESS CONTROL in large bold text near the top of the body.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted section heading text, type, and bbox match the visual structure.

candidate_findings.evidence: The rendered blue underlined text reads Quick link to Access Control Summary Table and is boxed at the correct location.
candidate_findings.rationale: Although the extracted block type is section_link, the candidate preset as text is acceptable for this standalone body link and the content/bbox match.

candidate_findings.evidence: The rendered control heading line shows AC-1 followed by POLICY AND PROCEDURES, boxed as a single heading region.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted text and section-heading role agree with the visible control heading, despite AC-1 appearing as a blue underlined link in the render.

candidate_findings.evidence: The label Control: appears directly below the AC-1 heading at the expected indentation.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted field-label text and small bbox match the rendered label.

candidate_findings.evidence: The first list item begins with a. Develop, document, and disseminate... and wraps onto a second line.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is correctly identified as a list item with bbox covering the rendered wrapped item.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item begins with 1. [Selection (one or more): Organization-level... and wraps onto a second line.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted list text, nesting position, and bbox agree with the rendered page.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item (a) Addresses purpose, scope, roles... is boxed at the proper indentation.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate accurately captures this list subitem and its line wrapping.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item (b) Is consistent with applicable laws... appears immediately below item (a).
candidate_findings.rationale: The list type, text, and bbox align with the rendered content.

candidate_findings.evidence: The item 2. Procedures to facilitate the implementation... is shown at the same nested level as item 1.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate correctly captures this list item and its visible wrapping.

candidate_findings.evidence: The item b. Designate an [Assignment: organization-defined official]... appears as a wrapped list item.
candidate_findings.rationale: The list classification and bounding region match the rendered body structure.

candidate_findings.evidence: The item c. Review and update the current access control: appears as a short list line.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate text and bbox match the visible list entry.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item 1. Policy [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]... is boxed below item c.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is a correctly extracted nested list item with matching text and geometry.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item 2. Procedures [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]... appears below the policy item.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted list text, bbox, and rendered position agree.

candidate_findings.evidence: The Discussion paragraph begins after the list and spans multiple lines down the page.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted paragraph text is normalized correctly and the bbox covers the rendered discussion block.

candidate_findings.evidence: The Related Controls line appears below the discussion and includes IA-1, PM-9, PM-24, PS-8, SI-12.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate captures the rendered related-controls text in the correct location as a body text block.

candidate_findings.evidence: The Control Enhancements: None. line appears below Related Controls.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted text and bbox match this short labeled body line.

candidate_findings.evidence: The References line appears near the bottom of the body and lists OMB A-130, SP 800-12, SP 800-30, SP 800-39, SP 800-100, and IR 7874.
candidate_findings.rationale: The reference preset, text, and bounding box agree with the rendered references line.

page_rationale: All required candidates are present in the extracted JSON and align with the rendered page geometry, text, and nearby structure. Page chrome, headings, list items, body discussion text, related-controls text, control-enhancements text, and references are consistently identified.
